MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL

MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, L.L.C.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR # 11332
